evals.prompt: Write a use case for a user resetting their password. The main flow should involve entering an email, receiving a link, and setting a new password. Include alternate flows for an unregistered email and an expired reset link.
evals.expected_output: A detailed use case specification for password reset.
expectations: Identifies the Primary Actor (e.g., Unauthenticated User)
Details the Main Success Scenario step-by-step
Includes an Extension/Alternate Flow for an unregistered email (e.g., show generic message to prevent enumeration)
Includes an Extension/Alternate Flow for an expired link (e.g., prompt to request a new link)
Uses a structured table or numbered list format
